text-block-1.title: The Visual Layer of the Matrix
text-block-1.text:
HTL (HTML Template Language), formerly known as Sightly, is Sling's secure templating language for rendering content. It separates presentation from logic, ensuring that templates remain clean and maintainable.

HTL is the interface that translates raw data into the visual reality users perceive - like the Matrix code becoming the green-tinted world Neo sees.

code-block-1.title: HTL Template Example
code-block-1.code:
${agent.name @ context='text'}

Role: ${agent.role}

The One

Abilities

  • ${ability.name} - Level: ${ability.level}

text-block-2.title: HTL Key Features
text-block-2.text:
• XSS Protection - Automatic output escaping by context
  • Logic-less - Business logic stays in Java classes
  • data-sly-use - Loads Sling Models or Use objects
  • data-sly-test - Conditional rendering
  • data-sly-list - Iteration over collections
  • data-sly-resource - Include other resources
